title: SDD CI Hardening
description: Tighten SDD gate to require `validated`/`done` on PRs to protected branches.
trigger: When current SDD baseline is stable for one full sprint.
value_prop: PRs to main blocked when no validated/done SDD exists; advisory on develop.

title: Process Metrics
description: Add SDD process KPIs (spec coverage, lead time impact, rework ratio).
trigger: When at least 10 PRs have passed through current SDD gate.
value_prop: Spec coverage, avg lead time, rework ratio available as KPIs at any time.
Advisory findings no longer block commits; only real errors reject the push.
title: Check Noise Reduction
description: Reduce non-actionable CI warnings and improve blocking/advisory classification.
trigger: When warning volume affects merge throughput.

title: Sync Drift Prevention
description: Add periodic drift report for Foundation vs consumers manifests/skills.
value_prop: Declared skills/MCP/backlog refs validated against actual filesystem on demand.
PR reviewers can verify spec coverage and validation evidence at a glance.
title: PR Template Quality
description: Standardize PR templates to include spec traceability and validation evidence.
trigger: When next workflow template update is scheduled.
resolved_by: .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md: added SDD ref input, spec status dropdown, validation evidence textarea.

title: Local Workflow Performance
description: Profile and optimize `wf health/verify` runtime for faster local loops.
trigger: When local validation runtime exceeds agreed SLO.
value_prop: wf commands profiled against SLO; PASS/WARN/FAIL output + report saved to reports/wf-benchmark.json.
Tasks gated dynamically: AI blocked at HARD_LIMIT, warned at SOFT_LIMIT, blocked offline. Event-bus rate-limit contributes to gate decision.
title: Runtime Router Gating
description: Dynamic gating based on real runtime load: token usage, event-bus rate limits, network/AI availability.
trigger: When runtime mode detection is needed before task execution.
resolved_by: runtime-router.ps1 -Mode gate -TaskType (ai|heavy-ai|network|local|metrics|any) + rate-limit integration + wf runtime-gate [type].

value_prop: Sub-agent results follow a standardized JSON Schema enabling reliable merge/consolidation across parallel dispatches.
title: Agent Result Schema
description: JSON Schema (draft-07) for structured sub-agent results: 5 required fields (agent_id, skill_name, timestamp, status, output) + definitions for evidence, decisions, errors, token_usage.

value_prop: Skills auto-discovered and cross-referenced against auto-delegation.json; orphans and unmapped skills reported for human decision.
title: Skills Auto-Discovery
description: Skills-discovery script with sync-delegation action that cross-references skills/ directories against auto-delegation.json to detect orphans, unmapped skills, and naming mismatches.

value_prop: Skills and tools auto-updated with SHA256 change detection; stale skills (>30 days) flagged for review.
title: Auto-Actualización Skills/Tools
description: Auto-update script with 3 actions (check/update/status), SHA256-based change detection, .skill-tracking.json state file, and stale detection for skills untouched >30 days.

value_prop: Third-party developers can register external skills as plugins via a standardized interface without modifying core routing.
title: Plugin Architecture
description: Extensibility contract for third-party plugins with standardized interface. JSON Schema for plugin registration, discovery script, loader engine, CI validation, and example plugin.

defer_reason: Current token optimization stack (11+ scripts, 30-40% compression, hot/warm/cold/archive tiering, budget guard with soft 70%/hard 90%) provides sufficient coverage. Max daily consumption recorded: ~32% of 30k budget. RTK would be infrastructure-level optimization not justified by current metrics. Re-evaluate only if consumption exceeds 70% soft threshold consistently.
value_prop: Not needed. Current token optimization mechanisms are sufficient (30-40% compression, max 32% daily budget usage).
title: Token Efficiency / RTK
description: Evaluated: token optimization stack (pre-compact, handoff-compress, context tiering, budget guard, telemetry) is robust. RTK not justified without real bottleneck.
trigger: When token consumption bottleneck is detected that cannot be mitigated by current mechanisms (pre-compact, handoff-compress, context tiering)
resolved_by: Evaluation complete. Current stack sufficient. See: scripts/utilities/token-budget-guard.ps1, pre-compact-hook.ps1, handoff-compress.ps1

value_prop: New users can bootstrap Foundation workspace with guided interactive TUI instead of manual setup.
title: TUI Installer
description: Interactive TUI installer and configurator to facilitate onboarding and native setup of Foundation in a new environment. PowerShell 7+ based with terminal UI. Already implemented.
resolved_by: scripts/utilities/foundation-installer-tui.ps1 (395 lines, full TUI with logo, menus, component selection, Git/Go/Engram install, logging, uninstall)
